question: What is the time zone of Salt Lake City?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?state
WHERE
  {   { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Utah>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/property/timezone>  ?tz .
        ?state    rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/class/yago/WikicatStatesOfTheUnitedStates> ;
                  <http://dbpedia.org/property/timezone>  ?tz
        FILTER ( ?state != <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Utah> )
      }
    UNION
      { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/San_Pedro_de_Atacama>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/timeZone>  ?timezone
        BIND(?timezone AS ?state)
      }
  }

question: What is the highest mountain in Germany?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?mountain
WHERE
  { ?mountain  rdf:type             <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Mountain> ;
              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/elevation>  ?elevation
      { ?mountain  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/location>  ?location .
        ?location  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/isPartOf>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Saxony> .
        ?location (<http://dbpedia.org/ontology/isPartOf>)* <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Germany>
      }
    UNION
      { FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?mountain  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/location>  ?loc } }
  }
ORDER BY DESC(?elevation)
LIMIT   1

question: Which American presidents were in office during the Vietnam War?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?answer
WHERE
  {   { BIND("Was U.S. president Jackson involved in a war?" AS ?question)
        BIND(if(EXISTS { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Andrew_Jackson>
                                   <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/battle>  ?battle
                       }, "yes", "no") AS ?answer)
      }
    UNION
      { BIND("Which presidents were born in 1945?" AS ?question)
        ?answer  rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/President> ;
                 <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/birthDate>  ?date
        FILTER strstarts(str(?date), "1945")
      }
    UNION
      { BIND("Who was John F. Kennedy's vice president?" AS ?question)
        <http://dbpedia.org/resource/John_F._Kennedy>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/vicePresident>  ?answer
      }
  }

question: Butch Otter is the governor of which U.S. state?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?governor ?timBurtonFilm ?borough
WHERE
  {   { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Wyoming>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/property/governor>  ?governor
      }
    UNION
      { ?timBurtonFilm
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/director>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Tim_Burton> ;
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/budget>  ?budget
      }
    UNION
      { ?borough  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/governmentType>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Borough_(New_York_City)> }
  }
ORDER BY DESC(?budget)
LIMIT   5

sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

ASK
WHERE
  { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Michael_Phelps>
              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/award>  ?award
    FILTER ( ( contains(lcase(str(?award)), "mvp") || contains(lcase(str(?award)), "grand prix") ) || contains(lcase(str(?award)), "heaviest") )
  }

question: Which artists were born on the same date as Rachel Stevens?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?result
WHERE
  {   { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Rachel_Stevens>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/birthYear>  ?result
      }
    UNION

                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/instrument>  ?result

                 <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/artist>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Bruce_Springsteen> ;
                 <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/releaseDate>  ?date
        FILTER ( ( ?date >= "1980-01-01"^^xsd:date ) && ( ?date <= "1990-12-31"^^xsd:date ) )
      }
  }

question: Which countries have places with more than two caves?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?result
WHERE
  {   { ?cave1   rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Cave> ;
                 <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/location>  ?place1 .
        ?place1  rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Place> ;
                 <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/country>  ?result .
        ?result  rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Country>
      }
    UNION
      { ?cave2  rdf:type  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Cave>
          { ?cave2   <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/location>  ?result .
            ?result  rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Country>
          }
        UNION
          { ?cave2   <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/location>  ?place2 .
            ?place2  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/country>  ?result .
            ?result  rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Country>
          }
      }
    UNION
      { ?cave3  rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Cave> ;
                <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/entranceCount>  ?entranceCount
        FILTER ( ?entranceCount > 3 )
        BIND(?cave3 AS ?result)
      }
  }
GROUP BY ?result ?cave3 ?place1 ?place2
HAVING ( ( ( ( COUNT(DISTINCT ?cave1) > 2 ) && bound(?place1) ) || ( ( ( ( COUNT(DISTINCT ?cave2) > 10 ) && bound(?result) ) && ( ! bound(?place1) ) ) && ( ! bound(?cave3) ) ) ) || ( ( ?entranceCount > 3 ) && bound(?cave3) ) )

sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?birthPlaceGoethe ?natalieBirthInUS ?soccerPlayersBornOnMalta
WHERE
  { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Johann_Wolfgang_von_Goethe>
              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/birthPlace>  ?birthPlaceGoethe
    OPTIONAL
      { FILTER EXISTS { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Natalie_Portman>
                                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/birthPlace>  ?city .
                        ?city     <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/country>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/United_States>
                      }
        BIND(EXISTS { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Natalie_Portman>
                                <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/birthPlace>  ?city .
                      ?city     <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/country>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/United_States>
                    } AS ?natalieBirthInUS)
      }
    OPTIONAL
      { ?soccerPlayersBornOnMalta
                  rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/SoccerPlayer> ;
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/birthPlace>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Malta>
      }
  }

WHERE

                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/editor>  ?answer

                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/deathPlace>  ?place .
        ?place    <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/website>  ?answer
      }
  }

question: Who wrote Harry Potter?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?author
WHERE
  {   { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/The_Hunger_Games>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/author>  ?author
      }
    UNION
      { ?author  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/author>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/The_Fault_in_Our_Stars> .
        ?books   <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/author>  ?author
        FILTER ( ?books != <http://dbpedia.org/resource/The_Fault_in_Our_Stars> )
      }
    UNION
      { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Game_of_Thrones>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/composer>  ?author
      }
  }

question: Give me all writers that won the Nobel Prize in literature.
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?writer
WHERE
  {   { ?writer  rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Writer> ;
                 <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/award>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Nobel_Prize_in_Literature>
      }
    UNION
      { ?writer  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/occupation>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Poet> .
        ?book    <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/author>  ?writer ;
                 rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Book>
      }
    UNION
      { ?writer  rdf:type  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Writer>
          { ?writer  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/almaMater>  ?edu .
            ?edu     <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/city>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Istanbul>
          }
        UNION
          { ?writer  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/almaMater>  ?edu .
            ?edu     <http://dbpedia.org/property/city>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Istanbul>
          }
        UNION
          { ?writer  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/education>  ?edu .
            ?edu     <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/city>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Istanbul>
          }
        UNION
          { ?writer  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/education>  ?edu .
            ?edu     <http://dbpedia.org/property/city>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Istanbul>
          }
      }
  }
GROUP BY ?writer
ORDER BY DESC(COUNT(?book))
LIMIT   1

sparql:

                <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/starring>  ?uri
      }
  }
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT   1

question: In which city was the president of Montenegro born?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?query ?presidentBirth1945 ?presidentEritrea ?vpKennedy
WHERE
  {   { ?presidentBirth1945
                  rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/President> ;
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/birthDate>  ?birthDate
        FILTER regex(str(?birthDate), "^1945")
      }
    UNION
      { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Eritrea>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/leader>  ?presidentEritrea ;
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/leaderTitle>  "President"@en
      }
    UNION
      { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/John_F._Kennedy>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/vicePresident>  ?vpKennedy
      }
  }

question: Which U.S. state has the highest population density?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?state
WHERE
  { ?state  rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/class/yago/WikicatStatesOfTheUnitedStates> ;
            <http://dbpedia.org/property/densityrank>  ?densityRank
  }
ORDER BY ASC(?densityRank)
LIMIT   1

question: What is the longest river in China?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?river
WHERE
  { ?river  rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/River> ;
            <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/length>  ?length
  }
ORDER BY DESC(?length)
LIMIT   1

question: What is the area code of Berlin?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?actor ?city ?subsidiary
WHERE
  {   { ?m     <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#broader>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Category:Cities_in_Germany> .
        ?city  <http://purl.org/dc/terms/subject>  ?m ;
               <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/areaTotal>  ?area
      }
    UNION
      { ?actor  rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Actor> ;
                <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/birthPlace>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Berlin>
      }
    UNION
      { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Lufthansa>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/subsidiary>  ?subsidiary .
        ?subsidiary  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/targetAirport>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Dortmund_Airport> ;
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/targetAirport>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Berlin_Tegel_Airport>
      }
  }
ORDER BY ?area
LIMIT   1

```PREFIX yago: <http://dbpedia.org/class/yago/>
PREFIX dbp: <http://dbpedia.org/property/>
PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT DISTINCT ?governor ?densestState ?stateMountMcKinley WHERE {
  
  # Governor of Wyoming
  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Wyoming> dbp:governor ?governor .
  
  # State of USA with highest population density
  ?densestState rdf:type yago:WikicatStatesOfTheUnitedStates ;
                dbp:densityrank ?rank .
  
  # In which US state is Mount McKinley located
  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Mount_McKinley> dbo:wikiPageRedirects ?redirectedUri .
  ?redirectedUri dbo:locatedInArea ?stateMountMcKinley .
  ?stateMountMcKinley rdf:type yago:WikicatStatesOfTheUnitedStates .
  
} ORDER BY ASC(?rank)
LIMIT 1
```

question: Who was the wife of President Lincoln?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?question ?answer
WHERE
  { VALUES ?question { "Who was the wife of U.S. president Lincoln?" "Was the wife of president Lincoln called Mary?" "Is Michelle Obama the wife of Barack Obama?" }
    BIND(if(( ?question = "Who was the wife of U.S. president Lincoln?" ), "SELECT DISTINCT ?uri WHERE { res:Abraham_Lincoln dbo:spouse ?uri }", if(( ?question = "Was the wife of president Lincoln called Mary?" ), "ASK WHERE { res:Abraham_Lincoln dbo:spouse ?spouse . ?spouse rdfs:label ?name FILTER regex(?name, \"Mary\", \"i\") }", if(( ?question = "Is Michelle Obama the wife of Barack Obama?" ), "ASK WHERE { res:Barack_Obama dbo:spouse res:Michelle_Obama }", ""))) AS ?queryString)
    FILTER ( false )
  }

```sparql
PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>
PREFIX res: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

SELECT ?question ?answer WHERE {
  VALUES (?question) {
    ("Who was the wife of U.S. president Lincoln?")
    ("Was the wife of president Lincoln called Mary?")
    ("Is Michelle Obama the wife of Barack Obama?")
  }
  
  BIND(
    IF(?question = "Who was the wife of U.S. president Lincoln?",
       "SELECT DISTINCT ?uri WHERE { res:Abraham_Lincoln dbo:spouse ?uri }",
       IF(?question = "Was the wife of president Lincoln called Mary?",
         "ASK WHERE { res:Abraham_Lincoln dbo:spouse ?spouse . ?spouse rdfs:label ?name FILTER regex(?name, \"Mary\", \"i\") }",
         IF(?question = "Is Michelle Obama the wife of Barack Obama?",
           "ASK WHERE { res:Barack_Obama dbo:spouse res:Michelle_Obama }",
           ""
         )
       )
    ) AS ?queryString
  )
  
  FILTER(false) # This disables execution here; see separate queries below
}
```
But the above includes multiple queries in one; the instructions require a single SPARQL query that answers the question.

Since the user gives three questions, but wants a single query that answers "Who was the wife of U.S. president Lincoln?", or "Was the wife of president Lincoln called Mary?", or "Is Michelle Obama the wife of Barack Obama?", but the instructions say "Generate a single SPARQL query that answers the question", I will assume the question is "Who was the wife of U.S. president Lincoln?" which is the first question in the list.

Therefore, I produce the same query structure as the example for that question:

```sparql
PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>
PREFIX res: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/>

SELECT DISTINCT ?wife WHERE {
  res:Abraham_Lincoln dbo:spouse ?wife .
}
```

That is consistent with the first example.

Alternatively, if the user wants all answers to the three questions within a single query, then that is not typically supported as ASK and SELECT queries differ in structure.

question: Which German cities have more than 250000 inhabitants?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?mariborPopulation ?germanyPopDensityRank ?smallestCity
WHERE
  {   { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Maribor>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/populationTotal>  ?mariborPopulation
      }
    UNION
      { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Germany>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/property/populationDensityRank>  ?germanyPopDensityRank
      }
    UNION
      { ?m        <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#broader>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Category:Cities_in_Germany> .
        ?smallestCity
                  <http://purl.org/dc/terms/subject>  ?m ;
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/areaTotal>  ?area
      }
  }
ORDER BY ?area
LIMIT   1

sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?uri
WHERE
  {   { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Agent_Smith>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/portrayer>  ?uri
      }
    UNION
      { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Gus_Fring>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/portrayer>  ?uri
      }
    UNION
      { ?uri  rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/TelevisionShow> ;
              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/starring>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Neil_Patrick_Harris>
      }
  }

sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?spouseOfTomCruise ?answer
WHERE
  { { BIND(<http://dbpedia.org/resource/Rita_Wilson> AS ?rita)
      BIND(<http://dbpedia.org/resource/Tom_Hanks> AS ?tomHanks)
      BIND(<http://dbpedia.org/resource/Tom_Cruise> AS ?tomCruise)
      BIND(<http://dbpedia.org/resource/James_Bond> AS ?jamesBond)
      OPTIONAL
        { FILTER EXISTS { ?tomHanks  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/spouse>  ?rita } }
      OPTIONAL
        { ?spouseOfTomCruise
                    <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/spouse>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Tom_Cruise>
        }
      OPTIONAL
        { FILTER EXISTS { ?jamesBond  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/spouse>  ?anySpouse } }
      BIND(if(EXISTS { ?tomHanks  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/spouse>  ?rita }, "yes", "no") AS ?ritaIsWifeOfTomHanks)
      BIND(if(EXISTS { ?jamesBond  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/spouse>  ?anySpouse }, "yes", "no") AS ?jamesBondMarried)
    }
  }
LIMIT   100

question: Through which countries does the Yenisei river flow?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?river ?capital ?city
WHERE
  {   { ?river  rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/River> .
        ?lake   <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/inflow>  ?river ;
                rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Lake> ;
                <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/country>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Germany>
      }
    UNION
      { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Himalayas>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/country>  ?country .
        ?country  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/capital>  ?capital
      }
    UNION
      { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Weser>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/city>  ?city
      }
  }

question: Give me all cars that are produced in Germany.
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?smallestCity ?actor ?chancellor
WHERE
  { { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT  ?smallestCity
      WHERE
        { ?m        <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#broader>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Category:Cities_in_Germany> .
          ?smallestCity
                    <http://purl.org/dc/terms/subject>  ?m ;
                    <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/areaTotal>  ?area
        }
      ORDER BY ?area
      LIMIT   1
    }
    OPTIONAL
      { ?actor  rdf:type  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Actor>
          { ?actor  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/birthPlace>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Germany> }
        UNION
          { ?actor  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/birthPlace>  ?place .
            ?place  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/country>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Germany>
          }
      }
    OPTIONAL
      { ?chancellor  rdf:type  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Person>
          { ?chancellor  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/office>  "Chancellor of Germany" }
        UNION
          { ?chancellor  <http://dbpedia.org/property/office>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Chancellor_of_Germany> }
      }
  }

question: What is the highest volcano in Africa?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?uri
WHERE
  { ?uri  rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Volcano> ;
          <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/locatedInArea>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Japan> ;
          <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/eruptionYear>  ?date
    FILTER ( year(?date) >= 2000 )
  }

sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?uri
WHERE
  {   { ?uri  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/occupation>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Poet> .
        ?x    <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/author>  ?uri ;
              rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Book>
      }
    UNION
      { ?uri  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/occupation>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Musician> .
        ?x    <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/author>  ?uri ;
              rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Book>
      }
    UNION
      { ?uri  rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Writer> ;
              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/award>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Nobel_Prize_in_Literature>
      }
  }
GROUP BY ?uri
ORDER BY DESC(COUNT(?x))
LIMIT   1

question: Who created English Wikipedia?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?answer
WHERE
  {   { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Wikipedia>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/author>  ?answer
      }
    UNION
      { ?answer  rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Royalty> ;
                 rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/class/yago/WikicatEnglishMonarchs> ;
                 <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/activeYearsStartYear>  ?date
      }
    UNION
      { ?answer   rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Pope> .
        <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Vatican_Television_Center>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/foundedBy>  ?answer
      }
  }
ORDER BY ?date
LIMIT   1

question: Which books were written by Danielle Steel?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?book
WHERE
  {   { ?book  rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Book> ;
               <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/author>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Danielle_Steel>
      }
    UNION
      { ?faultInOurStarsBook
                  rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Book> ;
                  rdfs:label            "The Fault in Our Stars"@en ;
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/author>  ?author .
        ?book     <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/author>  ?author
        FILTER ( ?book != ?faultInOurStarsBook )
      }
    UNION
      { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Les_Piliers_de_la_terre>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/author>  ?bookAuthor
        BIND(?bookAuthor AS ?book)
      }
  }

question: Which languages are spoken in Estonia?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?country ?languageCount
WHERE
  { { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT  (COUNT(DISTINCT ?lang) AS ?languageCount)
      WHERE
        { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Turkmenistan>
                    <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/language>  ?lang
        }
    }
    { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT  ?lang
      WHERE
        { ?lang  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/spokenIn>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Estonia> }
    }
    { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT  ?country (COUNT(DISTINCT ?officialLang) AS ?langCount)
      WHERE
        { ?country  rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Country> ;
                    <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/officialLanguages>  ?officialLang
        }
      GROUP BY ?country
      ORDER BY DESC(?langCount)
      LIMIT   1
    }
  }

PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>

PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

question: Give me all chemical elements.
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?margaretThatcherIsChemist ?usState ?ingredient
WHERE
  {   { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
        PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
        PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
        PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
        PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
        
        SELECT  (EXISTS { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Margaret_Thatcher>
                                    <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/profession>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Chemist>
                        } AS ?margaretThatcherIsChemist)
        WHERE
          {  }
      }
    UNION
      { ?usState  rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/class/yago/WikicatStatesOfTheUnitedStates> ;
                  <http://dbpedia.org/property/mineral>  ?mineral
        FILTER regex(?mineral, "gold", "i")
      }
    UNION
      { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Chocolate_chip_cookie>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/ingredient>  ?ingredient
      }
  }

question: Give me all American presidents of the last 20 years.
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?president1945 ?presidentPakistan1978 ?vicePresidentKennedy
WHERE
  {   { ?president1945
                  rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/President> ;
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/birthDate>  ?birthDate
        FILTER regex(str(?birthDate), "^1945")
      }
    UNION
      { ?presidentPakistan1978
                  <http://dbpedia.org/property/title>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/President_of_Pakistan> ;
                  <http://dbpedia.org/property/years>  "1978"
      }
    UNION
      { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/John_F._Kennedy>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/vicePresident>  ?vicePresidentKennedy
      }
  }

question: Which subsidiary of TUI Travel serves both Glasgow and Dublin?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?uri
WHERE
  {   { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Lufthansa>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/subsidiary>  ?uri .
        ?uri      <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/targetAirport>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Dortmund_Airport> ;
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/targetAirport>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Berlin_Tegel_Airport>
      }
    UNION
      { ?uri  rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Airline> ;
              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/alliance>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/SkyTeam>
      }
    UNION
      { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Yeti_Airlines>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/targetAirport>  ?uri
      }
  }

question: What languages are spoken in Pakistan?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?president ?languagePH ?languageCount
WHERE
  { ?president  <http://dbpedia.org/property/title>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/President_of_Pakistan> ;
              <http://dbpedia.org/property/years>  1978 ;
              <http://dbpedia.org/property/officeHolder>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Pakistan> .
    <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Philippines>
              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/officialLanguage>  ?languagePH .
    <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Turkmenistan>
              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/language>  ?languageCountEntity
    { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT  (COUNT(DISTINCT ?languageCountEntity) AS ?languageCount)
      WHERE
        { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Turkmenistan>
                    <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/language>  ?languageCountEntity
        }
    }
  }
LIMIT   1

SELECT DISTINCT  ?location
WHERE
  {   { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Mount_McKinley>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/wikiPageRedirects>  ?mckinleyRedirect .

                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/locatedInArea>  ?location .

                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/architect>  ?architect .

      }
    UNION
      { ?location  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/wineProduced>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Sparkling_wine> ;
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/location>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/France>
      }
  }

question: How short is the shortest active NBA player?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?player
WHERE
  { ?player   rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/BasketballPlayer> ;
              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/height>  ?height ;
              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/birthDate>  ?birthDate ;
              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/careerStation>  ?careerStation .
    ?careerStation
              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/league>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/National_Basketball_Association>
    OPTIONAL
      { ?player  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/highlights>  ?highlights }
    FILTER ( ?height > 2.0 )
    FILTER regex(?highlights, "MVP", "i")
  }
ORDER BY DESC(?height) ASC(?birthDate)
LIMIT   4

question: Which animals are critically endangered?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?wildlifeHost ?treeFrogAmphibian ?breed
WHERE
  {   { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/BBC_Wildlife_Specials>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/presenter>  ?wildlifeHost
      }
    UNION
      { FILTER EXISTS { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Hylidae>
                                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/class>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Amphibian>
                      }
        BIND(true AS ?treeFrogAmphibian)
      }
    UNION
      { ?breed  <http://dbpedia.org/property/breed>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/German_Shepherd> }
  }

question: Which politicians were married to a German?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?uri
WHERE
  {   { ?uri  rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Monarch> ;
              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/spouse>  ?spouse
          { ?spouse  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/birthPlace>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Germany> }
        UNION
          { ?spouse  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/birthPlace>  ?place .
            ?place   <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/country>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Germany>
          }
      }
    UNION
      { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Jacques_Chirac>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/spouse>  ?uri
      }
    UNION
      { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Abraham_Lincoln>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/spouse>  ?uri
      }
  }

question: How big is the earth's diameter?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?largestCountry ?longestRiver ?jordanHeight
WHERE
  { { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT DISTINCT  ?largestCountry
      WHERE
        { ?largestCountry
                    rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Country> ;
                    <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/areaTotal>  ?area
        }
      ORDER BY DESC(?area)
      LIMIT   1
    }
    { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT DISTINCT  ?longestRiver
      WHERE
        { ?longestRiver
                    rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/BodyOfWater> ;
                    <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/length>  ?length
        }
      ORDER BY DESC(?length)
      LIMIT   1
    }
    OPTIONAL
      { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Michael_Jordan>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/height>  ?jordanHeight
      }
  }
LIMIT   1

sparql:

    }
  }

question: Which U.S. state has the abbreviation MN?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?location ?stateWithGold ?mexicoStatesCount
WHERE
  { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Mount_McKinley>
              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/wikiPageRedirects>  ?redirectMount .
    ?redirectMount
              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/locatedInArea>  ?location .
    ?location  rdf:type             <http://dbpedia.org/class/yago/WikicatStatesOfTheUnitedStates> .
    ?stateWithGold
              rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/class/yago/WikicatStatesOfTheUnitedStates> ;
              <http://dbpedia.org/property/mineral>  ?mineral
    FILTER regex(?mineral, "gold", "i")
    { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT  (COUNT(?state) AS ?mexicoStatesCount)
      WHERE
        { ?state  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/type>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/States_of_Mexico> }
    }
  }

question: Who is the novelist of the work a song of ice and fire?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?author ?otherBooks ?gotThemeComposer ?hotelCaliforniaWriter
WHERE
  { OPTIONAL
      { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/A_Song_of_Ice_and_Fire>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/author>  ?author
      }
    OPTIONAL
      { ?otherBooks  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/author>  ?author
        FILTER ( ?otherBooks != <http://dbpedia.org/resource/The_Fault_in_Our_Stars> )
      }
    OPTIONAL
      { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Game_of_Thrones>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/composer>  ?gotThemeComposer
      }
    OPTIONAL
      { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Hotel_California>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/writer>  ?hotelCaliforniaWriter
      }
  }

question: In which studio did the Beatles record their first album?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?firstBeatlesAlbum
WHERE
  { ?firstBeatlesAlbum
              rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Album> ;
              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/artist>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/The_Beatles> ;
              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/releaseDate>  ?releaseDate
  }
ORDER BY ASC(?releaseDate)
LIMIT   1

question: Who was called Rodzilla?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?starring
WHERE
  {   { BIND(<http://dbpedia.org/resource/Abraham_Lincoln> AS ?lincoln)
        ?lincoln  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/spouse>  ?spouse .
        ?spouse   rdfs:label            ?spouseName
        FILTER regex(?spouseName, "Mary", "i")
      }
    UNION
      { ?film     rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Film> ;
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/country>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Spain> ;
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/producer>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Benicio_del_Toro> ;
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/starring>  ?starring .
        ?starring  rdf:type             <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Person>
      }
    UNION
      { BIND(<http://dbpedia.org/resource/Arnold_Schwarzenegger> AS ?arnold)
        ?arnold  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/almaMater>  ?alma .
        ?alma    rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/University>
      }
  }

question: Give me the capitals of all countries in Africa.
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

WHERE

              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/country>  ?country .
    ?country  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/capital>  ?capital
  }

question: Which bridges are of the same type as the Manhattan Bridge?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?bridge_seine ?river_brooklyn ?designer_brooklyn
WHERE
  { { ?bridge_seine
                rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Bridge> ;
                <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/crosses>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Seine>
    }
    OPTIONAL
      { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Brooklyn_Bridge>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/crosses>  ?river_brooklyn
      }
    OPTIONAL
      { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Brooklyn_Bridge>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/architect>  ?designer_brooklyn
      }
  }

question: How many companies were founded by the founder of Facebook?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?owner ?software ?company
WHERE
  {   { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Facebook>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/foundedBy>  ?owner
      }
    UNION
      { ?software  rdf:type             <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Software> .
        ?company  rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Company> .
        ?software  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/developer>  ?company .
        ?company  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/foundationPlace>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/California>
      }
    UNION
      { ?company  rdf:type  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Company>
          { ?company  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/numberOfEmployees>  ?numEmployees }
        UNION
          { ?company  <http://dbpedia.org/property/numEmployees>  ?numEmployees }
        FILTER ( ?numEmployees > 1000000 )
      }
  }

question: Show me hiking trails in the Grand Canyon where there's no danger of flash floods.
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?uri
WHERE
  { ?uri  rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Volcano> ;
          <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/locatedInArea>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Japan> ;
          <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/eruptionYear>  ?date
    FILTER ( year(?date) >= 2000 )
  }
